implemented_requirements: linked node conquest campaign with chapter progression
farms mines barracks forts watchtowers and capitals with distinct roles
four troop classes with class-based speed and combat multipliers
rally shield wall scout flare and bridge repair abilities
realm upgrades for logistics war council and iron discipline
menu chapter selection upgrades help pause and result overlays
structurally reserved top left right and bottom UI safe areas around the playfield
tracked icon UI gameplay art and audio assignments
animation_and_facing_evidence: GameView draws shared site art from assigned game_art assets for capitals cities farms mines barracks forts and watchtowers
marching packets lerp between nodes and use distinct runtime banner silhouettes for levy spear archer and cavalry traffic
bridge pulse shield status cut-off warnings and capture feedback communicate route and battle state changes during play
known_limits: the first delivery scope ships with 10 chapters rather than the broader campaign target described in the planning trace
moving armies use runtime animated heraldic banner tokens instead of imported humanoid directional sprite sheets
delivery_note: The first implementation preserves the confirmed conquest, supply, bridge-control, doctrine, upgrade, and tactical ability loop required for APK export.
